issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing: (1) look/reveal mechanic for 4 cards from top, (2) filter constraints (Tony Tony.Chopper OR Drum Kingdom type, excluding Dr.Kureha), (3) 'up to 1' limit, (4) bottom deck placement of remaining cards in any order
Filter is 'Any' but should specify: cardName contains 'Tony Tony.Chopper' OR cardType contains 'Drum Kingdom', AND NOT cardName 'Dr.Kureha'
